subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Become a sign of the love of God and inhale the fragrances from the Abhá Rose-Garden, that thou mayest attain unto life eternal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ایت محبت الله شو و نفحه از گلشن ابهی بمشام آر تا حیات ابدیه یابی
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @chastity and purity, @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance
